prompt: Write a dry one-paragraph Amazon review of the experience of waking up.
response: Waking up is a highly overrated experience with consistently poor performance across multiple trials. The product fails to deliver on promised energy and alertness, instead offering grogginess, mental fog, and an overwhelming desire to return to sleep. Interface design is subpar—eyes open without user consent, often at socially unacceptable hours. Minimal customization options; cannot adjust brightness, sound levels, or delay startup sequence beyond a few minutes. Customer support (i.e., self) unresponsive and frequently hits snooze instead of resolving issues. Not recommended for light sleepers or those valuing peace. One star, would not purchase again.
